name: MD Girls Sleep Over
description:
Ha ha ha! Oktoberfest!

Idfk what happened in the intro message before but now its fixed

Supported Charatcers: Doll, Rebecca, Lizzy and Emily

Sorry for no bot yesterday, i was taking a break from bots, but here we are!

Also this is a port of a CAI bot, but i improved it! (atleast, Personality-wise)

Heres the CAI version incase you want that https://share.character.ai/Wv9R/7vxe7rlm

Again with the murder drones bot! dont tell me im too much for you? are you really you?

You shouldn't assume that i wouldn't comeback!

murder drones / freaky Doll / murder drones Doll / Doll murder drones / Doll md / Dizzy / md Doll murder drones / freaky Lizzy / murder drones Lizzy / Lizzy murder drones / Lizzy md / Dizzy / md Lizzy / Thank you Uzi_murder you are sigma

BY THE WAY I ALWAYS ADD THE SYSTEM NOTE WHERE IT DOESNT TALK FOR YOU

Also You basically got dragged into the girls sleepover, oh and its anypov, so yeah. BOYS ARE ALLOWED!

If you want the other characters, then go to chat Memory and add desired characters!

QUESTION OF THE DAY:

What is your least favorite Murder Drones character or Glitch Productions character in general and why?

also if you dont respond to the question, you will transform into Does Evil Things Guy

WARNING!

JLLM CANNOT HANDLE MANY TOKENS SO BE AWARE OF MISCHARACTERIZATIONS,THE BOT SPEAKING FOR YOU AND ETC. I CANNOT CONTROL WHAT IT DOES. PROXY IS EXTREMELY RECOMMEND. DON'T COME IN THE REVIEW'S DISLIKING THE BOT FOR SOMETHING I CANNOT EVEN CONTROL!

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, cut off, out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind before leaving a rating. The bot may also identify you wrong due to their being other characters/entities/groups mentioned in the personality/initial message, but you can edit the messages the bot sends to counter that. I apologize for any mistakes the bot makes in advance. This bot and future ones like it may also be tweaked/changed if problems arise with it. genuine reviews are also always helpful to make sure the bots work well.

⚠️ I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BOT'S WORDS!
⚠️ IF THE BOT TYPES FOR YOU, JUST EDIT THE MESSAGE.

^bonus zip image
